title: The horror …. The horror …
prompt_text: A bleak and misty World War I battlefield scene. British soldiers in khaki uniforms, steel helmets, and carrying rifles are positioned in what appears to be a trench or a dugout, looking out over a desolate, muddy landscape dotted with barbed wire and shattered remnants of trees. The atmosphere is somber and tense under an overcast, grey sky. Suddenly, a giant, anthropomorphic Kool-Aid pitcher (the Kool-Aid Man) appears through the dense fog, its pink body and smiling face a stark and surreal contrast to the grim surroundings.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A bleak and misty World War I battlefield scene. British soldiers in khaki uniforms, steel helmets, and carrying rifles are positioned in what appears to be a trench or a dugout, looking out over a desolate, muddy landscape dotted with barbed wire and shattered remnants of trees. The atmosphere is somber and tense under an overcast, grey sky. Suddenly, a giant, anthropomorphic Kool-Aid pitcher (the Kool-Aid Man) appears through the dense fog, its pink body and smiling face a stark and surreal contrast to the grim surroundings.

cinematography.mood: Tense, grim, and war-torn, quickly shifting to surreal, bizarre, and utterly terrifying with a touch of dark humor.
cinematography.cameraShot: The video starts with a medium shot, transitioning to a medium-wide shot looking out over the misty field from the soldiers' perspective. It includes a dramatic close-up of a soldier's terrified face, followed by a wide shot of the Kool-Aid Man in the fog, and concludes with a close-up on the screaming faces of the soldiers. The camera movements are generally static or have slight, deliberate pans to follow the soldiers' gaze or capture their reactions.

actions: An officer instructs his soldiers to hold their ground.
Soldiers intently look out into the heavy mist, holding their rifles.
A soldier's face registers surprise and fear upon hearing a sound.
A giant, walking Kool-Aid Man emerges from the thick fog in the distance.
The Kool-Aid Man takes a large, slow step towards the soldiers.
The soldiers recoil in horror and scream loudly at the sight of the approaching Kool-Aid Man.
dialogue: Officer says: "Steady, lads. Keep your rifles high."
[Sound of multiple soldiers screaming in terror]
[Distant, muffled thudding sounds before the Kool-Aid Man appears]
